title: Welcome to Reacher!
description: We can't wait to keep you informed of Reacher's latest updates, insights, and strategies to help you thrive on TikTok Shop, whether you're a brand or a creator. Continue reading our Welcome to Reacher blog post and remember to subscribe to our email newsletter to be first to know of any future Reacher news!
author: Reacher Bora

images.alt: The number one AI assistant for TikTok Shop brands

contentHtml:
Thank you for checking out our new blog page!

We’re excited to have you join us.

Each week, we will post a new blog with the latest updates, insights, and strategies to help you thrive on TikTok Shop, whether you're a brand or a creator. You can also sign up for our email newsletters via the blog page if you prefer to get this information directly via email!

Our blogs are designed to keep you informed about everything happening on TikTok Shop and in the world of social commerce. We’ll share actionable strategies, success stories, and tips on how to grow on the platform—whether you’re using paid tools like Reacher or taking the DIY route.

At Reacher, our mission is to support your journey on TikTok Shop, providing you with valuable knowledge (for free!) and the resources you need to succeed. Whether you’re just starting out or looking to take your efforts to the next level, we’re here to help.

If you ever have any questions or just want to chat, don’t hesitate to reach out via our contact page. We’re here for you, whether you’re using our software or not!

Welcome to the community, and thanks for being part of the Reacher family!
